PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'rm\s+-rf|rm\s+-r\s+/|--force|--hard|push.*-f|push.*--force|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|:(){ :|:& };:|> /dev/sd|mkfs\.|dd\s+if='; then echo 'BLOCKED: This command matches a dangerous pattern. Find a safer approach or ask the user for explicit permission.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '\.env|\.env\.local|credentials|secrets|password'; then echo 'CAUTION: This action involves a sensitive file. Proceed with care.' >&2; exit 1; fi
